### 2. Qwen 3.8 Max released as open weights (Who’s Afraid of Chinese Models?)

- Source: [simonwillison.net](https://simonwillison.net/2026/Jul/20/afraid-of-chinese-models/#atom-everything)

Builder/operator takeaway: A new frontier open-weight model release is a build-on-it decision point for solo devs.

Uncertainty: Exact open-weight license terms and practical deployability of Qwen 3.8 Max are not confirmed here.
